releaseNotes: v0.24.17 — Five durability + safety fixes from a hardening audit. (1) Cross-pharmacy data leak fixed: outbound sync queue is now scoped to the enrolled pharmacy and cleared on disconnect so a re-pairing to a different pharmacy can't drag old data into the new one. (2) Scan atomicity: a scan now writes its inventory row, audit entry, and sync queue entry inside a single transaction so a crash or power-loss mid-scan can't leave orphan rows. (3) WAL journal mode + NORMAL sync for faster commits and better concurrent reader behavior. (4) Mandatory-update gate when the installed version is older than the manifest's minSupportedVersion (red, non-dismissible banner). (5) Trial signup now emails the setup code via Resend so the customer has it even if the success redirect drops the URL param. Plus: GitHub Action auto-deploys all 10 Edge Functions on push to main.
